TeamBlueLock

Full-stack financial operations platform built with Next.js and MongoDB. Features inventory management, ingredient costing, profit-margin analysis, and operational reporting dashboards.

AI Stock Prediction Research

Developed machine-learning models using financial indicators and market data to predict short-term stock movements while evaluating model performance against real market outcomes.

Python • Finance • Machine Learning

Personal Finance Tracker

Budgeting and financial management platform featuring transaction tracking, spending analytics, and budget variance monitoring.

Finance • Analytics • Web Development

Python • APIs • FX Markets

Financial Data Research Toolkit

Statistical analysis workflow using regression models, robust standard errors, multicollinearity testing, and financial datasets.

R • Econometrics • Quantitative Finance

Research

Research Question

Does R&D investment intensity predict annual stock returns differently across technology and non-technology firms?

Analysing the Impact of R&D on Stock Returns

Empirical finance study testing whether R&D investment intensity predicts annual stock returns for 100 publicly traded firms, split between technology and non-technology sectors.

OLS HC3 SE VIF Ramsey RESET

Model Logic

Short research design from inputs to interpretation.

01

Input Variables

R&D intensity, firm size, profitability, and sector classification.

→
02

OLS Regression

Tested whether R&D investment predicts annual stock returns.

→
03

Result

R² ≈ 0.01

No statistically significant R&D premium detected.

→
04

Interpretation

Supports EMH; other variables likely drive returns.

Built across continents. Focused on finance.
